title: A Decisive Matchup in the Onigashima Raid
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Tama, Unknown person #2, Ulti, Unknown person #3, Big Mom as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've gotta get out of here!! She's not gonna be down for long!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And big mom is right there!! We don't stand a chance!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Tama!! Stay with us!! Nami, she's in bad shape!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huff...huff... running isn't going to solve anything. They won't quit till they've hunted us down!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't care about that though. All I care about is putting that woman in her place!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hahaha!! Does she think twirling that dinky baton is gonna help?!

dialogue.speaker: Ulti
dialogue.text: ulti-sama easily out- classes you, cheer- leader!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You realize there's no way to escape my grip, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Big Mom even took out JLLT-SAMA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's what you get for laying your hands on Otama!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell?! aren't we supposed to be allies?!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 34 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
